title: Create Canyon
description: Create Canyon is a modpack centered around the Create mod, with an emphasis on building in terrain generated by Tectonica.
body:
# Create Canyon Modpack

Create Canyon is a modpack centered around the **Create** mod, with an emphasis on building in terrain generated by **Tectonica**.

The pack includes a selection of **QoL mods** to make gameplay smoother, while staying true to the vanilla feel of Minecraft. You'll also find decorative mods like **Frameblocks**, **Rechiseled**, and **Chipped**, which allow for more detailed and stylish builds.

Additionally, **Freecam** is included for easier building and creative exploration.

# My Other Modpacks

- [Technic Crucible - All-around Modpack for 1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/technic-crucible)
- [Aeronautics: Conquering the Wild - Create Aeronautics Modpack for 1.21.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/aeronautics-conquering-the-wild)
